title: 7 Herbal Teas For Menstrual Cramps
description: Lavandula angustifolia teas contains linalool and linalyl acetate, two active constituents that have anti-inflammatory properties. These compounds help reduce pain and swelling, which can ease menstrual cramps. Lavandula angustifolia teas also contains apigenin, a flavonoid that has a sedative effect and can help relax the muscles, further reducing cramp pain.
